title: Göteborg Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Göteborg with a Z-Score of -3.03. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Göteborg are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The low temperature is causing a high demand for heating, with 11.6 GG of Heating Degree Days (HDD). 
 The humidity is relatively low at 40%, with a gentle breeze of 4.3 km/h, but this does not alleviate the cold snap's severity.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
